text:
At 1:42 AM, an n8n workflow detected a new PDF invoice uploaded to cloud storage.

That single event triggered an entire autonomous pipeline.

Node 1:
A webhook captured the upload event.

Node 2:
OCR extracted invoice text and tables.

Node 3:
An LLM classified:
- vendor type
-
name: Praveen Kumar Verma

text:
How we use n8n to auto-classify cold email replies (saves 10h/week):

Trigger: New reply webhook from Smartlead

Classification logic (via AI node):

→ "Interested" → draft reply + flag for human approval

→ "Not now" → tag in CRM, schedule 90-day follow-up

→ "OOO" → pause
name: Cold Email Engineer
